regional_cost_note: Interior designers in Whanganui typically charge $110–$190/hr or 10–20% of project value. A full residential interior design project typically costs $6,000–$35,000+ in fees. Whanganui rates are typically 10–15% below the national average. Scope the engagement carefully — hourly rates suit small consultations; percentage-of-project suits full-service renovations.
